title: 每月统计
description: 查看用户、积分、订单的每月数据变化

funnel.title: 每月注册 Cohort 漏斗
funnel.description: 每一行代表当月注册的一批用户，后面看这批人后来有多少做到首次成功生成、开始结账、最终付费。

table.signup_to_first_success: 注册 -> 首次成功生成
table.first_success_to_checkout: 首次成功生成 -> 结账

acquisition.title: 获客维度拆解
acquisition.description: 把注册 cohort 按 campaign、ad group、workflow、match type 拆开看，直接判断哪一类流量更容易把用户推到付费。
acquisition.empty: 这个周期里还没有可归因的注册数据。

tuning.title: Cold Start Tuning
tuning.description: Compare signup cohorts by country, language, and device so you can decide which slices to lean into, cap, or pause during account cold start.
tuning.empty: No signup data for this tuning view yet.
